heroHeadline: Hamas-Led October 7 Attack: 1,195 Killed, 251 Taken Hostage
heroSubtitle: The deadliest attack on Jewish people since the Holocaust — assault timeline, hostage crisis, intelligence failures, and IDF response
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Israel Police, UN OCHA, Israeli government, Reuters, AP, Haaretz, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are official Israeli counts; Hamas-theater figures are separately noted and contested.
